title: dalbergia ramosii
intro: Dalbergia ramosii, also known as the Philippine mahogany or yacal tree, is a species of tree in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Dalbergia ramosii include reducing fever, treating respiratory problems, and alleviating pain and inflammation. The plant is commonly prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
